'''mahuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackie|crackie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackie|crackie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mahuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæhichith|mæhichith]] || [[word:mæhichij|mæhichij]] || [[word:mæhichish|mæhichish]] || [[word:mæhichi|mæhichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahuhuchuth|mahuhuchuth]] || [[word:mahuhuchuj|mahuhuchuj]] || [[word:mahuhuchush|mahuhuchush]] || [[word:mahuhuchu|mahuhuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahuchuth|mahuchuth]] || [[word:mahuchuj|mahuchuj]] || [[word:mahuchush|mahuchush]] || [[word:mahuchu|mahuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahufchuth|mahufchuth]] || [[word:mahufchuj|mahufchuj]] || [[word:mahufchush|mahufchush]] || [[word:mahufchuf|mahufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mahuchuthu|mahuchuthu]] || [[word:mahuchuju|mahuchuju]] || [[word:mahuchushu|mahuchushu]] || [[word:mahuchuku|mahuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mahuchuth|mahuchuth]] || [[word:mahuchuj|mahuchuj]] || [[word:mahuchush|mahuchush]] || [[word:mahuchu|mahuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mahuchuthul|mahuchuthul]] || [[word:mahuchujul|mahuchujul]] || [[word:mahuchushul|mahuchushul]] || [[word:mahuchukul|mahuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mahuchuthuthu|mahuchuthuthu]] || [[word:mahuchujuju|mahuchujuju]] || [[word:mahuchushushu|mahuchushushu]] || [[word:mahuchuku|mahuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mahuchuthun|mahuchuthun]] || [[word:mahuchujun|mahuchujun]] || [[word:mahuchushun|mahuchushun]] || [[word:mahuchukun|mahuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mahuchuthuoro|mahuchuthuoro]] || [[word:mahuchujuoro|mahuchujuoro]] || [[word:mahuchushuoro|mahuchushuoro]] || [[word:mahuchukuoro|mahuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
